title: Commercial LPG Cylinder Prices Hiked By Rs 993 Amid Iran War, Domestic Rates Unchanged
description: It is the third time since February 28 when the price of an LPG cylinder has been increased. It was first increased in March by Rs 144 and then on April 1 by Rs 200. In contrast, domestic gas rates remain unaffected, offering a shield for household budgets against the rising regional tensions.
